cli.errorNoProvider: Neither gemini nor codex CLI found. Install one or set DAACS_GEMINI_CLI_PATH / DAACS_CODEX_CLI_PATH.
cli.errorNoProviderAll: No available CLI provider found. Install codex, gemini, or ollama CLI, or set the DAACS_*_CLI_PATH environment variables.
cli.errorClaudeProviderRequiresOllama: Claude provider requires an Ollama executable. Set DAACS_LOCAL_LLM_CLI_PATH to the full Ollama path.
cli.workspaceCommandTimedOut: Workspace command timed out after 120 seconds. The command may be interactive or long-running.
cli.localLlmTimedOut: Local LLM timed out after {seconds} seconds. The model may be too large or stuck.
cli.geminiTimedOut: Gemini CLI timed out after {seconds} seconds.
cli.codexTimedOut: Codex CLI timed out after {seconds} seconds.
cli.claudeTimedOut: Ollama/Claude CLI timed out after {seconds} seconds.
